steps.title: Find the decay multiplier
steps.content:
A $12\%$ yearly decline means $88\%$ of the previous year's amount remains each year.
$$100\%-12\%=88\%=0.88$$

steps.title: Build the model
steps.content:
The initial amount is $450$ million, and the multiplier is applied once per year after 2010.
$$C=450(0.88)^t$$
The answer is B.
